shopping_197.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to correctly identify the target item. The objective was to add the item "one row up and one column left of the red and white polka dot romper" to the cart. The agent incorrectly selected the item that was one column left of the romper in the *same* row, instead of the item one row up and one column left.
shopping_197.REFLECTION: When interpreting relative positioning instructions like "one row up and one column left," carefully identify the reference item first. Then, apply the row and column shifts sequentially and precisely to locate the correct target item before performing any actions. Double-check the final identified item against the description.
